advice.work: Give your garden a rest day — rest is part of growth
advice.study: Study stress is seasonal; your effort will bloom in time
advice.family: Family friction is pruning — it can help relationships grow healthier
advice.friends: Friendship flowers need watering from both sides — reach out with care
advice.communication: Try starting with "I feel…" instead of blame
advice.trust: Trust grows slowly with steady watering — give each other patience
advice.privacy: Every flower needs its own space — boundaries matter
advice.other: Every feeling is a chance to know yourself better
